title: Presentation: Hidden Decisions You Don’t Know You’re Making
summary: Dan Fike and Shawna Martell explain how "hidden decisions" silently shape software architecture and engineering culture. By examining the invisible defaults behind CI/CD bottlenecks, platform complexity, and misaligned metrics, they share frameworks for leading with intentionality. Learn to identify the "decision behind the decision" to better incentivize high-performing teams and careers. By Shawna Martell, Dan Fike

title: Presentation: Are We Ready for the Next Cyber Security Crisis Like Log4shell?
summary: Soroosh Khodami discusses why we aren't ready for the next Log4Shell. He shares live demos of dependency confusion and compromised builds, explaining how minor oversights gift hackers total system access. He explains the value of Software Bill of Materials (SBOM), dependency firewalls, and shifting security left to build resilient DevSecOps cultures that protect the modern software supply chain. By Soroosh Khodami
title_cn: 演示：我们准备好应对下一次像 Log4shell 这样的网络安全危机了吗？
summary_cn: Soroosh Khodami 讨论了为什么我们还没有为下一个 Log4Shell 做好准备。他分享了依赖关系混乱和受损构建的现场演示，解释了轻微的疏忽如何给黑客带来整个系统的影响。
translation:
【标题】演示：我们准备好应对下一次像 Log4shell 这样的网络安全危机了吗？
【摘要】Soroosh Khodami 讨论了为什么我们还没有为下一个 Log4Shell 做好准备。他分享了依赖关系混乱和受损构建的现场演示，解释了轻微的疏忽如何给黑客带来整个系统的影响。

title: Writing on the wall: Art UK digitises thousands of murals as street artworks go mainstream
summary: From medieval church wall paintings to Liam Gallagher’s viral X post, charity has catalogued more than 6,600 piecesSome of the UK’s smallest public murals are on bollards in Shrewsbury while one of the biggest is on a 1960s 16-storey block of flats in Gosport.Perhaps the funniest though is in Cardiff.
